query_text: all-mountain ski with no rocker, under 90mm waist

results.explanation: Fischer RC One 82 GT strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness. Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing" Review: "incredible stiffness for all-day piste skiing" Review: "Not tiring like a race ski but still performs at a high level."
Salomon Stance 90 strongly matches on: stiffness, playfulness. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Stiff and damp from the titanal construction" Review: "Not playful, very precise"
Blizzard Brahma 88 strongly matches on: stiffness. Moderate match on: playfulness. Review: "Stable at speed, doesn't wander."
